CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-02-2009 Continued To Jan-12-10 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. William Gargano, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lois Jones.
William Leonard Verick, Esq. for Plaintiff: Mateel Environmental Justice Foundation.
Plaintiff Witness Christopher Crowe was sworn and examined.
After hearing the testimony and considering of the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendants: Briel Industria DE Electrodomesticos SA and La Pavoni Spa as follows:
As to Defendant Briel Industria DE Electrodomesticos SA
Civil Penalties $460,000.00
Attorneys Fees $37,814.00.
As to Defendant La Pavoni Spa
Civil Penalties $4,780,000.00
Attorneys Fees $36,907.00
As to Defendant Elecktra SLR, matter continued and added to the Default Prove-Up calendar on Nov. 17, 2009 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 218 for further hearing.
Counsel to prepare Judgment and submit to Dept. 218 for signature.
